title: Rewrite Settings page — show current vault, live validation, no-restart change
implementation_notes: On page load: call GET /api/settings and display the current resolvedRoot and isValid status.
If isValid is false, show a prominent warning banner with invalidReason so the user knows the vault is broken.
Input field: pre-fill with current vaultRoot value.
Live validation: on input blur or after 500ms debounce, call POST /api/settings/validate and show inline feedback (valid/invalid + reason) before the user saves.
On save: call POST /api/settings; on success show a success state (no restart message needed — it applies immediately); on 422 show the server error.
Remove the 'restart required' note — the backend now applies the change immediately.
Keep the existing glass-card design language consistent with the rest of the app.
acceptance_criteria: Page loads showing the current vault root path and a green/red validity indicator.
If vault is currently invalid (path wrong), a warning banner is visible immediately.
Typing a new path triggers live validation with visual feedback before saving.
Saving a valid path updates the UI to show the new path as active; no restart prompt shown.
Saving an invalid path shows the 422 error message inline.
No console.log or debug statements in the final component.
completion_summary: Rewrote the settings page to show current vault status, live validation feedback, and immediate inline save results without restart messaging.
